name: Exoskeleton
additional_info: Exoskeleton's resistance will be less effective if you do not meet its Fortitude requirement, losing 0.125% resistance for every point under 40 Fortitude, capping at 6.875% resistance with 15 Fortitude. Chitin's resistances stack multiplicatively with Exoskeleton.
desc: You have a layer of fortified Natural Armor that replenishes when you rest. Your Natural Armor will resist 10% Physical Damage when active.
